commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f79b9619cf19fcab93525c4372b01d8495f2f957)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes AGENTS.md post-compaction reinjection require an explicit `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections` array, threads that policy through the safeguard summary path, updates docs/config help/tests/changelog, and improves collapsed Control UI tool-row wrapping and summary text.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main reinjects default AGENTS.md sections when the config key is absent and keeps collapsed tool rows small, muted, nowrap, and ellipsized; I did not run a live browser capture in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a maintainer compatibility/session-state decision for a protected maintainer PR, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: fix: make compaction reinjection opt-in
target.body:
## Summary

- make post-compaction AGENTS.md section reinjection opt-in via `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`
- carry that opt-in through both post-compaction context and compaction-safeguard summary suffix paths
- keep explicit default section lists working, including legacy `Every Session` / `Safety` fallback only for opted-in configs
- improve collapsed Control UI tool rows so summary text wraps/readably colors in light/dark themes while expanded details preserve raw input/output
- update config help/docs and changelog

Fixes #45488.
Fixes #45649.
Supersedes #67090.

## Verification

Final pushed head: `f79b9619cf19fcab93525c4372b01d8495f2f957`, rebased on `origin/main` at `5be62e779b2e42d4c12bad0d6f4efde7d2690d84`.

Final-base proof after the last rebase:

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md docs/gateway/config-agents.md docs/reference/session-management-compaction.md docs/reference/token-use.md src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/extensions.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard-runtime.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.css ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.ts` -> passed
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/extensions.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard-runtime.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.ts` -> passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD && git diff --check` -> passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts -t "reads opted-in post-compaction context"` -> 1 passed, 38 skipped
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts -t "allows explicit split Vitest config targets"` -> 1 passed, 86 skipped
- `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings

Full focused suites run on the same patch before the final busy-main rebase:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner.misc.runreplyagent.test.ts` -> 1 file, 39 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/test-projects.test.ts` -> 1 file, 87 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/post-compaction-context.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.post-compaction-guard.test.ts src/config/schema.help.quality.test.ts` -> 5 files, 240 passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/tool-cards.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.test.ts` -> 4 files, 58 passed
- Browser proof with system Chrome + Playwright fixture using real `ui/src/styles/chat/tool-cards.css`: light/dark collapsed rows computed `white-space: normal`, `text-overflow: clip`, `overflow-wrap: anywhere`; expanded raw text stayed `with Example Deck`

Broad changed gate was attempted but blocked by environment/provider setup:

- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` failed because `.github/workflows/crabbox-hydrate.yml` does not contain a Testbox step
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` fell back to AWS and failed because this environment has no usable AWS credentials/IMDS access

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Post-compaction AGENTS.md reinjection is disabled unless users explicitly configure `agents.defaults.compaction.postCompactionSections`; both the post-compaction context helper and compaction-safeguard summary suffix now honor that policy. Collapsed Control UI tool rows remain readable without hiding normal summaries behind CSS ellipses, while raw expanded tool input/output remains unchanged.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw worktree on macOS with Node/Vitest; browser rendering proof in installed Google Chrome through Playwright using the real Control UI tool-card stylesheet.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See the Verification section for exact Vitest, format, oxlint, diff-check, autoreview, and browser proof commands.

Evidence after fix: Unit tests cover unset config returning null, explicit `[]` disabled, explicit default sections enabled with legacy fallback, custom sections, compaction-safeguard summary default-disabled behavior, explicit summary opt-in, collapsed display cleanup, bounded collapsed markdown preview, and raw expanded details preservation. Browser proof checked computed light/dark collapsed row styles and raw expanded text.

Observed result after fix: Final-base static checks, targeted CI-regression tests, and autoreview passed on `f79b9619cf`; full focused suites passed on the same patch before the last busy-main rebase. The two previously failing CI shards now pass on the PR (`checks-node-agentic-agents` and `checks-node-auto-reply-reply-agent-runner`). Remaining `check-test-types` CI failure matches current `main` at `5be62e779b` with TS7016 declaration errors in untouched `scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts` imports for `npm-runner.mjs`, `pnpm-runner.mjs`, and `windows-cmd-helpers.mjs`.

What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` was not completed because both configured Crabbox remote providers were blocked by environment/provider setup as described above.
target.author: bunsdev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
